requirements.trigger: a support agent submits a customer email
requirements.system_response: return the orders associated with that email from the last 90 days
requirements.rendered: When a support agent submits a customer email, the lookup tool shall return the orders associated with that email from the last 90 days.
requirements.rationale: Primary order-status call flow; support agents need immediate access to recent orders to resolve live calls.

requirements.trigger: a lookup finds no orders for the submitted email within the last 90 days
requirements.system_response: show an explicit no-orders-found message rather than an empty screen
requirements.rendered: If a lookup finds no orders for the submitted email within the last 90 days, then the lookup tool shall show an explicit no-orders-found message rather than an empty screen.
requirements.rationale: Unwanted-behaviour sibling for ORDER-01. An empty screen leaves the agent uncertain whether the lookup ran at all.
